prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约4094名、3942名、4260名、7975名、7257名。2021–2023年稳定在4000名左右，2024年因新增马来西亚分校低分专业（网络空间安全7975名）导致位次大幅后移至7975名，2025年回升至7257名（仍受分校专业数据科学与大数据技术影响）。近两年位次明显后移，但剔除分校因素后本部专业实际位次约4600–4700名；2021–2025年上海市招生计划分别为29人、27人、26人、32人、32人；2026年计划大幅缩减至21人，较2025年减少34.4%，属明显缩招。缩招将加剧竞争，推动最低位次前移（数字减小）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 厦门大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第25名，2025年第24名，近年稳定在24–26名区间，属于国内顶尖高校梯队；2026年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及校园安全（盗摄偷拍）、学校管理回应、录取断档信号；抖音热度排名总榜第5（高热），短视频曝光量大；投档异常文件显示2025年厦门大学招生情况持续恶化，高分段和低分段均出现下滑。高热关注度与负面舆情并存，对报考心理产生复杂影响；第五轮学科评估A+学科4个（化学、海洋科学、生物学、统计学），A学科3个（工商管理、应用经济学、生态学），A-学科7个（化学工程与技术、数学、法学、理论经济学、社会学、马克思主义理论、教育学），A-及以上共14个，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐；法学分化观望；新闻传播明显劝退。厦门大学在上海市招生的经济学类、会计学、统计学类、计算机类等均为高热/推荐专业。上海2026年考生总数约66700人（较2025年49276人增长35.4%），竞争显著加剧；省控线本科批2021–2025年稳定在400–405分，无明显波动；厦门大学位于福建省厦门市，非本省高校；上海市考生对南方沿海985高校认可度较高，但跨省报考存在一定地域偏好差异。该校在上海市招生占比相对较小，2026年计划仅21人，属小规模招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次受马来西亚分校影响后的波动趋势、2026年大幅缩招34.4%加剧竞争、2026年上海考生总数大幅增长35.4%进一步推高竞争烈度、声誉负面可能抑制部分报考热情、抖音高热关注度吸引更多考生关注等多重因素，考虑2026年取消马来西亚分校专业使本部最低位次前移，取修正量-200，预测2026年最低位次约5560名，波动区间5060–6060名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 统计学类（含经济统计学、统计学、数据科学）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全、人工智能、软件工程）
- 法学（含涉外法治人才基地实验班）
- 会计学（会计、财务、审计，含双学士学位项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学）
- 经济学类（含金融学、财政学、税收学、国际经济与贸易、经济学，含双学士学位项目）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、集成电路设计与集成系统、微电子科学与工程、通信工程）
- 工科试验班（集成电路与电子信息）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（生命科学与医药健康类，含生物科学、生物技术、药学、预防医学、医学检验技术）
- 新闻传播学类（含新闻学、广告学、传播学、国际新闻与传播，含双学士学位项目）
- 工科试验班（南强书院卓越领航班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测最低位次约5560名，区间5060–6060名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主力（数学类、经济学类、电子信息类），一档专业（统计学类、计算机类、法学、会计学）作为冲刺，三档专业（理科试验班生命科学类、新闻传播学类）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（5060名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（6000名左右）应以二档稳妥为主。注意2026年招生计划大幅缩减至21人，竞争激烈，建议合理搭配专业组志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai Comprehensive category were approximately 4094, 3942, 4260, 7975, and 7257 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, it stabilized around 4000. In 2024, due to the addition of low-score majors at the Malaysia campus (Cyberspace Security at 7975), the ranking significantly dropped to 7975. In 2025, it rebounded to 7257 (still affected by the Data Science and Big Data Technology major at the campus). In the past two years, rankings have notably shifted backward, but excluding the campus factor, the actual ranking for main campus majors is about 4600–4700. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan in Shanghai was 29, 27, 26, 32, and 32 students respectively. In 2026, the plan is sharply reduced to 21 students, a 34.4% decrease from 2025, indicating a clear enrollment reduction. This reduction will intensify competition, pushing the minimum ranking forward (decreasing the number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 25th, and in 2025, 24th, remaining stable in the 24–26 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly involving campus safety (voyeurism and theft), school management responses, and admission cutoff anomalies. On Douyin, its popularity ranking is 5th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure. The abnormal admission file shows that in 2025, Xiamen University's admission situation continued to deteriorate, with declines in both high and low score segments. High attention and negative public opinion coexist, creating a complex impact on application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 4 A+ disciplines (Chemistry, Marine Science, Biology, Statistics), 3 A disciplines (Business Administration, Applied Economics, Ecology), and 7 A- disciplines (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Mathematics, Law, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, Marxist Theory, Education), totaling 14 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended; Law is divided with caution; Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged. At Xiamen University, majors enrolling in Shanghai such as Economics, Accounting, Statistics, and Computer Science are all high-heat/recommended majors. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Shanghai is about 66,700 (a 35.4% increase from 49,276 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition. The provincial control line for the undergraduate batch from 2021 to 2025 has been stable at 400–405 points, with no significant fluctuations. Xiamen University is located in Xiamen, Fujian Province, not a local university in Shanghai. Shanghai examinees have a relatively high recognition of coastal 985 universities in the south, but cross-province applications have some regional preference differences. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanghai is relatively small, with only 21 planned spots in 2026, making it a small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the fluctuating trend of historical rankings affected by the Malaysia campus, the 34.4% sharp enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, the 35.4% significant increase in Shanghai examinees in 2026 further raising competition intensity, negative reputation possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, and high Douyin attention attracting more examinees, and taking into account the cancellation of Malaysia campus majors in 2026, which will move the main campus minimum ranking forward, with a correction of -200, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 5560, with a fluctuation range of 5060–6060.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Statistics (including Economic Statistics, Statistics, Data Science)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering)
- Law (including International Rule of Law Talent Base Experimental Class)
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Auditing, including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Economics (including Finance, Public Finance, Taxation, International Economics and Trade, Economics, including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuits and Electronic Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences and Medicine Health, including Biological Science, Biotechnology, Pharmacy, Preventive Medicine, Medical Laboratory Technology)
- Journalism and Communication (including Journalism, Advertising, Communication, International Journalism and Communication, including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Nanqiang Academy Excellence Leadership Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5560, with a range of 5060–6060. For rankings within this range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Economics, Electronic Information) as the main force, Tier 1 majors (Statistics, Computer Science, Law, Accounting) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Science Experimental Class Life Sciences, Journalism and Communication) as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 5060), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 6000), prioritize Tier 2 majors for stability. Note that the 2026 enrollment plan is sharply reduced to 21 students, making competition fierce. It is recommended to reasonably allocate major group preferences.
